title: Commercial Advertising & Visual Design
subtitle: High-impact digital creatives designed with a focus on visual hierarchy, precise composition, and rapid brand recognition.

title: Onpreo CRM: Desktop UX/UI Redesign
subtitle: A strategic desktop redesign of the Onpreo CRM ecosystem. Transforming a complex, data-heavy real estate platform into an action-oriented, intuitive dashboard focused on efficiency and cognitive load reduction.
category: UX/UI Design, SaaS Desktop Redesign, Web Enterprise Software
overview: Analysis and complete optimization of the Onpreo web application. By eliminating visual noise and introducing a clean, structured component architecture, the interface was re-engineered to support real estate agents in their daily high-velocity workflows.
finalResult: From Data Clutter to Actionable UI

title: Onpreo App
subtitle: A mobile CRM app designed for real estate agents, from UX research to interactive prototype.
overview: A mobile-first CRM solution that transforms how real estate agents manage leads, tasks, and client communication, on the go.
finalResult: Designing a CRM experience that fits in your pocket — without losing power or clarity.

title: onpreo - Marketing Design
subtitle: Marketing presentations and visual assets designed for onpreo AG — communicating AI-powered real estate tools to professionals.
overview: Designing marketing materials that explain a complex AI product — clearly, visually, and on-brand.
finalResult: Turning a technical AI product into a visual story anyone can understand.

title: SOOK – App-Promotion-Video
subtitle: A motion design project combining storytelling, typography animation, and 3D mockups to bring an app to life, emotionally and visually
overview: How do you make someone feel the need for an app they've never heard of — in under 60 seconds?
finalResult: From a chat message to a download, storytelling that sells without selling.

title: IHOP
subtitle: A responsive microwebsite connecting health-conscious users with trusted organic farms — designed from persona research to interactive Figma prototype.
overview: The organic food market lacks a trustworthy, simple platform connecting city users with local farms. IHOP bridges that gap through clear navigation, warm visuals, and a complete purchase-ready interface.

title: SMooTH
subtitle: Ostfalia Hochschule · #endpräse14
finalResult: A full editorial magazine exploring how typography can be more than text — it becomes material, object, texture, and emotion.
